# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a modern GitHub Pages website built with Vite and vanilla JavaScript to showcase major repositories. The site features:

- Clean, modern design with responsive layout
- GitHub API integration to fetch and display repositories
- Repository cards with descriptions, languages, stars, and forks
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Fast loading with Vite's optimized build process

## Development Guidelines
- Use modern ES6+ JavaScript features
- Follow mobile-first responsive design principles
- Keep the design clean and minimalist
- Use CSS Grid and Flexbox for layouts
- Implement proper error handling for API calls
- Ensure accessibility best practices
